results.title: Hypertension: First-Line Treatment
results.snippet: First-line therapy combines lifestyle changes with thiazide diuretics, ACE inhibitors, ARBs, or calcium channel blockers. Choice depends on age, ethnicity, and comorbidities.

results.title: Lifestyle Modifications for Blood Pressure
results.snippet: Reducing sodium intake, the DASH diet, regular aerobic exercise, weight loss, and limiting alcohol can each meaningfully lower blood pressure.

results.title: Resistant Hypertension
results.snippet: When blood pressure stays high on three agents, adding a mineralocorticoid receptor antagonist such as spironolactone is often effective.
